title: nvm_list silently skips non-sequential IDs
description: nvm_list advances start_id by setting it to out_id+1. This assumes the server returns the lowest ID >= start_id (monotone sequential IDs). The doc says 'list all NVM object IDs' with no caveat. If the server returns an arbitrary matching ID instead of the lowest, the loop may skip objects. The advance logic is an undocumented implicit invariant with no reference to the wolfHSM wire protocol spec, so a future contributor cannot verify correctness.
